commit.message:
fix: reranker 500 error — add -ub/-b 4096 batch size flags

Root cause: llama-server default physical batch size (-ub 512) too small
for token-dense chunks. Single query-document pairs exceeding 512 tokens
caused HTTP 500. Fix adds -ub 4096 -b 4096 to reranker server flags and
restores RERANK_CANDIDATES from 10 back to 50.

Includes debug suite in dev/llama_server/ with numbered scripts pattern:
- 01_capture_stderr: start reranker with log capture
- 02_reproduce_500: stress test with --db/--synthetic/--verify/--compare
- 03_test_batch_size: test different -b values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 1m Batch 3 — trinity combos, BOTH direction fails, STOCH+ROC still champion

CCI+ROC collapsed to 1 trade in validation. BOTH direction unviable (Sharpe 0.06).
Triple STOCH+CCI+ROC modest pass (Sharpe 1.02, 299 trades, 92.6% WR) but well
below B1 champions. STOCH mandatory on 1m — every combo without it fails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix canvas drag-and-drop: detect swaps via per-instance settings

The StreamDeck SDK doesn't change action positions on canvas drag —
it swaps the per-instance settings instead. Store macroIndex in each
action's settings so mismatches between stored and physical position
reveal drag-swaps. Also auto-apply PI drag reorder on drop.

Fix kiwix viewer hash format — use book name, not full content path

The kiwix viewer prepends /content/ to the hash internally via
userUrl2IframeUrl(). Using #/content/{zim} caused a doubled path.
The correct format is #{zim}/ (just the book name with trailing slash).

commit.message:
fix: data curation — correct metric interpretation across platforms

- Google Ads: fix result_type ('conversion' instead of network key)
  so Google conversions count in KPIs and CRM lead detection
- Google Ads: aggregate campaign rows by campaign+date before storing
  (API returns one row per network per day; was losing data on dedup)
- Google Ads: clear error messages for missing/invalid credentials
  (invalid_grant, invalid_client, missing developer token)
- TikTok: add video_play_actions metric (was hardcoded to 0)
- constants.ts: add 'conversion' and registration types to LEAD_RESULT_TYPES
  so Google/TikTok conversions are counted as leads in KPI cards
- dataTransform.ts: deduplication key now includes platform to avoid
  cross-platform collisions
- dataTransform.ts: fix getDaysBack — '90d'=90, 'all'=0 (no limit)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation

commit.message:
fix: resolve infinite rerun loop and dependency conflicts on Streamlit Cloud

- Use --no-deps to install only finlib itself (transitive deps like pandas
  are already in the venv via requirements.txt), preventing pandas 3.x from
  shadowing the venv's pandas 2.x and breaking streamlit's pandas<3 requirement
- Use --upgrade to cleanly overwrite on repeated cold starts
- Replace st.rerun() with importlib.invalidate_caches() + direct import to
  eliminate the infinite install-rerun loop caused by Python caching the
  initial ImportError across reruns

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch Wikipedia iframe to kiwix viewer for search and proper formatting

The raw content pages lack kiwix's search overlay, toolbar, and
navigation. The kiwix viewer provides the full experience: search bar,
autocomplete, article navigation, and proper CSS loading.

Add verified condition variable (kernel/condvar.c port)

Verus model with 9 verified properties (C1-C8): init empty,
signal wakes one, broadcast wakes all, wait adds thread,
priority ordering preserved. No FFI needed — condvar is a pure
wait queue wrapper; safety comes from already-verified mutex/waitq.

- 68 Verus verified, 0 errors (up from 59)
- 12/12 condvar integration tests pass under Miri (no UB)
- 11/11 Zephyr condvar_api tests pass on qemu_cortex_m3
- 5 proptest properties, 1 fuzz target, 8 Kani harnesses

commit.message:
fix: install finlib to /tmp to avoid venv permission error on Streamlit Cloud

Streamlit Cloud's venv site-packages is not writable at runtime.
Install finlib with --target /tmp/finlib_packages and prepend that
directory to sys.path so the package is importable after installation.

commit.message:
Social features: bookmarks, stories, share, DMs (#36)

* Fix 6 contract failures: double-wrap and partial user selects

Found via new API contract test script that validates every endpoint
returns the exact JSON shape iOS expects.

Fixes:
- checkins controller: return result.data array (not {data, total})
- restaurants checkins controller: same fix
- comments author hydration: include isPrivate, followerCount,
  followingCount, postCount in select (iOS User model requires them)
- notifications actor hydration: same expanded select
- Add scripts/api-contract-test.ts that logs in, hits every endpoint,
  and validates response shapes match iOS Codable models

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Exclude scripts/ from nest build to fix deploy crash

The api-contract-test.ts in scripts/ was being included in the nest
build, causing compilation failure and missing dist/main.js in prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Instagram-level speed, quality, check-in flow & video support

Performance:
- Add Nuke image caching (100MB memory + 300MB disk) with LazyImage
- Add blurhash placeholders for colored loading states
- Enable gzip compression for all API responses
- Add missing DB indexes (post.authorId, notification compound, follow reverse)
- Bump image quality: medium 1080px/q85, thumb 600px/q80, original 2048px/q92
- Add image prefetching for next 5 posts in feed scroll

Check-in flow:
- Restaurant selection is now mandatory for every post
- Rename "New Post" to "Check In" throughout (tab, nav title, buttons)
- Auto-create check-in record linked to post on creation

Video support (10s Reels-style):
- Backend: FFmpeg video processing (transcode to H.264 1080p, extract thumbnail)
- Backend: Accept video MIME types (mp4, quicktime, mov) up to 50MB
- iOS: Video selection from PhotosPicker with auto-thumbnail generation
- iOS: Auto-play muted video in feed with loop and mute toggle
- iOS: HEIC upload support (0.92 quality, fallback JPEG)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add FFmpeg to Dockerfile for video processing in production

The @ffmpeg-installer/ffmpeg npm package may not work on Alpine's musl libc,
so install system ffmpeg via apk as a reliable fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix 3 Xcode build errors: Nuke API and actor isolation

- Remove isDeduplicationEnabled (not in this Nuke version, on by default)
- Simplify LazyImage in RestaurantDetailView to avoid main-actor isolation error

* Add @MainActor to coverImageSection to fix actor isolation error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Inline cover image LazyImage to fix actor isolation cascade

PlacePickerView uses Apple Maps (MKLocalSearch) which always returns
restaurantId: nil. Since restaurantId is now required on the backend,
auto-create the restaurant via POST /restaurants before creating the post.

test: add direct regression coverage for WebSocket registration path

Extract resolveWebSocketProject() from inline server.ts beforeHandle into
packages/daemon/src/websocket/project-resolution.ts so it can be tested
without pulling in the full server dependency tree.

7 new tests cover the WebSocket-specific session-sync lifecycle:
- New project via X-Kspec-Dir header triggers onProjectRegistered
- New project via ?project= query param triggers onProjectRegistered
- Already-registered project does NOT trigger callback
- Non-canonical path normalized before callback (regression)
- Default project used when no path specified
- Error when no path and no default project
- X-Kspec-Dir header takes precedence over ?project= query param

Task: @01KKBD6KH5F5MVC5BXV2NQG474

be B-roll showing a scroll-stopping cinematic visual tied to the hook's

a couch. Matches how real direct-response ads actually open.

commit.message:
Fix race condition: block premature redirect during registration

Firebase Auth state fires before Firestore writes complete, causing
the dashboard to load before profile/app_key docs are written.
Added isRegistering flag to suppress the useEffect redirect until
all setDoc calls finish, then navigate manually.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: AuraTwin-web
repository.description: The main webpage of the AuraTwin project

commit.message:
fix: eliminate duplicate document scenes and force visual variety in scene breakdowns

Two root causes of generic/repetitive scenes:
1. parseVisualPlanResponse was appending buildDocumentScenes after AI output,
   creating exact duplicates of check/approval-letter scenes the AI already
   generated by following the mandatory BEATS in the system prompt.
2. SYSTEM prompt had no anti-repetition rules, allowing the AI to generate
   multiple identical A-roll "spokesperson speaks" scenes back-to-back.

Fixes:
- Remove buildDocumentScenes append from parseVisualPlanResponse (mock still
  appends them; AI output no longer gets duplicates)
- Add VARIETY MANDATE to SYSTEM prompt: no consecutive A-roll, max 40% A-roll,
  each B-roll must be a distinct visual type, B-roll must reference specific
  script details (dollar amounts, names, locations)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 1m Batch 2 — BBANDS/DONCHIAN fail validation, STOCH+CCI+ROC trinity confirmed

BBANDS (93% Sharpe drop) and DONCHIAN (131% drop) collapsed in validation
despite strong discovery fitness (0.58-0.68). Normalized sub-values overfit
to fill timing on 1m bars. Batch 1 winners (STOCH+ROC Sharpe 2.60,
STOCH+CCI 2.50) remain unchallenged.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- InvlogApp: wire AppearanceManager with .preferredColorScheme

commit.message:
Fix Wikipedia viewport to fill available screen space

Use position: fixed with reactive sidebarWidth offset to escape the
constrained #app container. This makes the iframe fill the full viewport
minus the sidebar, fixing the "tiny viewport" issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: aspirant-client
repository.description: Vue.js 3 frontend for the Aspirant platform — games, file manager, admin tools

commit.message:
Fix Electron paste via Edit>Paste menu; atomic focus-steal in osascript

Electron apps (Codex, Cursor, etc.) ignore System Events keystroke
Cmd+V after programmatic activation. Fix: use the app's own
Edit > Paste menu command via accessibility, which Electron always
honours. Native apps (Claude) keep using keystroke Cmd+V.

Also: move the entire paste+restore sequence into a single osascript
for atomic timing. Remove the separate JS setTimeout restore path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: turn organizer into a proactive stay-on-track agent

- Proactive nudges: overdue/stale todos now actually send iMessages
  (reminder_service previously only cached them in memory)
- Scheduled check-ins: morning 8 AM, midday 1 PM, EOD Friday 4 PM PT
- Time-aware prompts: all Claude calls now include day/time context
- Snooze support: snoozed_until column + /snooze command + agent tool
- Smarter stale detection: get_overdue() and get_stale() are separate,
  both respect snoozed_until
- New iMessage commands: /done, /snooze, /focus, /w (week), /p (priority)
- Conversation memory: rolling 10-message history with 2h TTL for . commands
- Agent improvements: history param, snooze_todo + get_overdue_todos tools,
  improved executive-assistant system prompt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove PR preview workflows, push directly to main

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: fall back to Claude for visual plan when OpenAI is not configured

generateVisualPlan and generateMoreBRoll now try OpenAI first, then
Claude as a fallback, and only return mock if neither provider is
available. Users with only an Anthropic key now get real AI-generated
scene breakdowns and b-roll instead of template mock data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
